sections.title: What this processing run produced
items: Derived columns created: diff_policy_rate, ret_spot_price, lag3_asset_return, lead2_asset_return, rollmean6_asset_return, rollvol6_asset_return.

sections.title: What a normal appendix should show
items: A concise data-preparation log that lists the exact transformations applied in order.
A preview or schema of the final prepared sample.
A downloadable prepared dataset used for estimation.

sections.title: Manual replication focus
items: Reapply imputation, winsorization, transforms, feature construction, and filtering in the documented order.
Verify row and column counts against the saved preparation summary.
